payload.answer: No explicit entity mentions were provided in the input. A large CSV table with repeated id,name,value rows should not be stored as durable personal memory merely because it appears in the conversation; only explicit, durable, user-relevant facts or entity mentions should be extracted, and none are present here.
citations: CSV table with 500 rows: id,name,value repeated many times.
